operation.name: InsertOrUpdate
operation.sql: INSERT INTO dialog_drafts (user_id, peer_type, peer_id, peer_dialog_id, draft_kind, message, entities_payload, reply_to_peer_seq, draft_payload_schema_version, draft_payload, date) VALUES (:user_id, :peer_type, :peer_id, :peer_dialog_id, :draft_kind, :message, :entities_payload, :reply_to_peer_seq, :draft_payload_schema_version, :draft_payload, :date) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE draft_kind = VALUES(draft_kind), message = VALUES(message), entities_payload = VALUES(entities_payload), reply_to_peer_seq = VALUES(reply_to_peer_seq), draft_payload_schema_version = VALUES(draft_payload_schema_version), draft_payload = VALUES(draft_payload), date = VALUES(date)

operation.name: SelectByUserPeer
operation.sql: SELECT user_id, peer_type, peer_id, peer_dialog_id, draft_kind, message, entities_payload, reply_to_peer_seq, draft_payload_schema_version, draft_payload, date FROM dialog_drafts WHERE user_id = :user_id AND peer_type = :peer_type AND peer_id = :peer_id LIMIT 1

operation.name: SelectActiveByUser
operation.sql: SELECT user_id, peer_type, peer_id, peer_dialog_id, draft_kind, message, entities_payload, reply_to_peer_seq, draft_payload_schema_version, draft_payload, date FROM dialog_drafts WHERE user_id = :user_id AND (draft_kind != 0 OR message != '')

operation.name: ClearByUserPeerBeforeDate
operation.sql: UPDATE dialog_drafts SET draft_kind = 0, message = '', entities_payload = :entities_payload, reply_to_peer_seq = 0, draft_payload_schema_version = :draft_payload_schema_version, draft_payload = :draft_payload, date = :date WHERE user_id = :user_id AND peer_dialog_id = :peer_dialog_id AND date <= :clear_before_date
